name: NovaKur Base Theme for OpenCart 4
shortDescription: Lightweight component-based OpenCart 4 base theme with Twig templates for product cards, price blocks, cart, and more.
description: NovaKur Base is the foundational OpenCart 4 theme providing a clean, component-based Twig template system. It includes templates for product cards, price blocks, discount badges, add-to-cart buttons, wishlist, product tabs, and standard commerce components. Use it as a starter theme or as the foundation for customization.
